name: Järbo Garn
description: One of Sweden's oldest and most beloved yarn brands, producing quality yarns since 1922. Known for their wide range of wool, cotton, and blended yarns.

name: Ullcentrum i Öland
description: A traditional wool workshop on the island of Öland, processing locally sourced Swedish wool into high-quality spinning fiber and yarn.
orderDetails: Order by phone or email via the contact page

name: Klippan Yllefabrik
description: A historic woolen mill founded in 1879, producing sustainable textiles and yarn from natural fibers. Famous for their throws and blankets as well as quality yarn.

name: Wålstedts Textilverkstad
description: A small-scale textile workshop in the heart of Dalarna specializing in hand-spun and small-batch yarn made from Swedish wool breeds.
orderDetails: Contact via email to place an order

name: Rätvisan
description: A sustainable yarn brand focused on ethically sourced Scandinavian fibers, offering naturally dyed and undyed skeins for hand knitters and weavers.

name: Gotlandsgarn
description: Producers of authentic Gotland wool yarn, made from the native Gotland sheep breed known for its silky, lustrous fiber with natural grey tones.

name: Västergötlands Ullspinneri
description: A regional wool spinning mill processing fleece from local farms in Västra Götaland into sturdy, rustic yarns ideal for traditional Scandinavian patterns.
orderDetails: Order by phone or visit the mill directly

name: Hifa-2 Trådfabrik
description: A Swedish thread and yarn manufacturer with decades of experience, producing roving, weaving yarn, and specialty craft threads for the Nordic market.

name: Östergötlands Ullspinneri
description: Family-run wool spinning mill founded in 1981 by Ulla-Karin Hellsten and Börje Norberg. Produces high-quality Swedish wool yarn and textiles using vintage mechanical machines. Famous for the award-winning 'Bää' wool blanket and exports extensively to Japan.

name: Båvens Spinnhus
description: Craft spinning mill founded in 2013 in the heart of Sörmland. Produces a wide range of handcraft-focused yarns from Swedish wool, including breed-specific, mohair and traditional folk-breed ('allmogerase') yarns. Also offers courses and mill tours.

name: Filtmakeriet
description: Small-batch wool spinning mill in Kilafors specialising in 100% Swedish sheep wool. Produces knitting yarn, needle felt, carded roving and filling material — all sourced within 60 km of the mill. Also offers custom spinning (lönspinning) for sheep farmers.

name: Gotlands Spinneri
description: Cooperative spinning mill on Gotland producing carded yarn and roving exclusively from Gotland and Leicester sheep grazing on the island. Fleece is hand-sorted and gently washed before being spun on vintage machines, some dating to the 1920s and 1940s.

name: Karlsbergsgården Spinneri
description: Modern small-scale spinning and carding mill established in 2015. Primarily a custom processing mill (lönspinneri) — takes in fleece from sheep and alpaca owners and returns finished yarn, carded roving or needle-felt. Some finished yarn available for direct purchase on site.
orderDetails: Order via the website contact form or by phone

name: Rodens Ullbruk
description: Sustainable wool mill in Norrtälje producing yarn from Swedish and Nordic wool. Sells yarn and knitting kits through their webshop and a factory shop open Fri–Sat. Also offers custom spinning, courses and regular 'ullkafé' social evenings.
